title: rubus × meridianus
intro: Rubus × meridianus, also known as the Himalayan blackberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, derived from the cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × meridianus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in culinary and cosmetic applications.
